name: Automation & Scripting
description: Powerful tools for advanced automation, including custom JS script execution and recurring task scheduling.

toolDeclarations.name: run_js_script
toolDeclarations.description: Execute a JavaScript script with access to the system context (ctx). This allows for complex logic, loops, and multi-step automation. The script has access to ctx.executeShell, ctx.dumpUI, ctx.findElement, ctx.boundsToCenter, ctx.delay, ctx.showToast, and ctx.isAutonomyEnabled.

code.description: The JavaScript code to execute. Example: 'const xml = await ctx.dumpUI(); if (xml.includes("Login")) { await ctx.showToast("Found login screen"); }'

toolDeclarations.name: schedule_recurring_task
toolDeclarations.description: Schedule a recurring automation task (like a cronjob).

description.description: Short description of what the task does.

intervalMs.description: Interval between executions in milliseconds (minimum 60000 / 1 minute).

jsScript.description: The JavaScript code to run when the task is due.

shellCommand.description: Optional Android shell command to run natively in the background. Prefer this for real background cron jobs because it does not need the React Native app to stay open.

toolDeclarations.name: list_recurring_tasks
toolDeclarations.description: List native background recurring automation tasks.

toolDeclarations.name: cancel_recurring_task
toolDeclarations.description: Cancel a native background recurring automation task by id.
